query:
SELECT
                c.id AS channel_id,
                c.name,
                c.channel_type::text AS "channel_type!",
                cp.joined_at
            FROM comms_channel_participants cp
            JOIN comms_channels c ON c.id = cp.channel_id
            WHERE cp.user_id = $1
              AND cp.left_at IS NULL
            ORDER BY cp.joined_at ASC, c.id ASC
